emotional_tone: Authoritative, massive scale, futuristic, premium deep tech

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Technology Showcase. Asymmetry and negative space. Use subgrid where applicable.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px) to maintain Brutalist/Swiss rigidity

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). border-collapse style layout, 1px subtle borders (border-white/10), flat background, hover lift and shadow.
surface_strategies.header: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant). bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_engine: Lenis (Smooth scrolling) is mandatory. Install via `npm i @studio-freight/lenis`.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Framer Motion. Staggered fade-ins for text. Parallax on hero image. Scroll-triggered borders.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text color shifts from text_secondary to text_primary. Borders glow slightly (border-[#D4FF00]/50).

components_instructions.global: Do not use standard Vercel/Stripe looking components. Build raw HTML + Tailwind for structure. Use Shadcn only for form/interactive logic.
components_instructions.hero: Full screen (min-h-screen). Absolute background image with heavy overlay. Large typography. Use tracking-tighter. Tagline: 'Energy Harvested. Intelligence Amplified. Humanity Elevated.'
components_instructions.tech_showcase: Interactive 30 Technologies Grid. Use a dense Bento Grid. 6-8 core technologies get larger blocks with icons/text. The rest can be a dense, scrolling marquee (react-fast-marquee) or smaller list items to show sheer volume.
components_instructions.corporate_dossier: Timeline UI for 2012-2025. Vertical timeline with glowing nodes. Highlight massive scale (14 countries, 1850 employees).
components_instructions.core_expertise: Highlight Wireless Energy Harvesting. Dark card with glowing accents. Perhaps use a pulsing animation on an energy node graphic.
components_instructions.stats: Massive typography for '$2.8B' Valuation and '214 Patents'. font-black, possibly with text-stroke or gradient text.
components_instructions.leadership: Grid of 3 portraits. High contrast black & white or dark tone. Hover state reveals colored accent borders.
components_instructions.contact_form: Shadcn UI forms, heavily customized. Solid dark backgrounds, 1px white/20 borders, straight corners. accent_energy for CTA button.

hero_bg.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape. For hero background.

corporate_hq.description: Low angle glass building at night. For Corporate Dossier section.

tech_expertise.description: Close up of motherboard/circuit. For Wireless Energy Harvesting core expertise section.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on #050505 background. #D4FF00 accent is for decorative borders or large text, test contrast if used for body text.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid.
